notes: iter16 HAR-detailed schema with session_state + full project_start/message_start/message_result payload shapes from HAR #1031 STILL fails to render '차단', BUT failure mode is THIRD-DISTINCT — meaningful new signal again. So iter16 confirms: (a) session_state shape was correct — past the TypeError, (b) message_start payload accepted — engine moved into component instantiation, (c) message_result payload is being PARSED and dispatched to a renderer, but the renderer's required fields (likely content_type / component_type / data_schema_version / page_content) are still mismatched OR missing — component can't mount. This is BREAKTHROUGH-adjacent: we are now ONE layer away from the warning render path. URL shows /agents?id=ffa4f815-d384-4c08-9682-1f0fcf9c181f confirming an agent session was created (engine accepted handshake fully).
